airport.name: Xi'an Xianyang International Airport
airport.toCity: Take metro line 14 to city center; airport shuttle available; taxis use metered fares.

transport.metro: Get a Xi'an Metro card or use WeChat/Alipay QR codes for easy travel.
transport.taxi: Use metered taxis; apps like Didi are reliable; avoid unofficial cabs.
transport.didi: Download Didi app; link foreign card or use Alipay; set destination in Chinese.
tips: Metro runs from 6 AM to 11 PM.
Avoid rush hours 7-9 AM and 5-7 PM.

payment.alipay: Register with passport; bind foreign card; use for payments and transport.
payment.wechatPay: Link foreign card or use tourist version; scan QR codes widely accepted.
payment.cash: Carry some cash; small vendors may not accept cards.
payment.foreignCard: Visa/Mastercard accepted in hotels and malls; use cash or mobile pay elsewhere.

tips: Book in advance during peak seasons.
Try street food but ensure hygiene.
Eat where locals eat for authenticity.

emergency.localTip: Learn basic Chinese phrases for emergencies; keep hotel address in Chinese.

bestTimeToVisit: Spring (April-May) and autumn (September-October) for mild weather.
touristTips: Carry ID and hotel card at all times.
